name: alterlab-borzoi
description: Predict genome-wide functional genomics tracks from DNA sequence with Borzoi (Linder 2025) — a sequence-to-function model outputting RNA-seq, CAGE, ATAC, and ChIP coverage across long context, used to score non-coding and regulatory variant effects. Use when predicting functional tracks from a DNA sequence, scoring a non-coding/regulatory variant's effect on expression or chromatin, or doing in-silico mutagenesis of a locus. To LOOK UP a variant's population frequency prefer alterlab-gnomad; for
author: AlterLab-IEU
